---
title: "Events"
---

## Upcoming Events

### This Month

| Date | Event | Time | Location |
|------|-------|------|----------|
| Feb 10 | Problem Solving Session | 5:00 PM | Math 100 |
| Feb 17 | Guest Lecture: Prof. Smith | 4:00 PM | Math 202 |
| Feb 24 | Math Competition Prep | 6:00 PM | Math 100 |

### Past Events

- January 20: New Member Welcome Event
- January 27: Introduction to Group Theory Workshop

### Subscribe

Want to stay updated? You can subscribe to our events:

- **Add to Your Calendar**: [Download our calendar file](mathsoc-calendar.ics) and import it into Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar, or any calendar app
- **Email Updates**: [Join our mailing list](mailto:mathsoc@ubc.ca)

Importing the calendar file will automatically sync all Math Society events to your personal calendar!
